pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and verifier.py
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which generates this synthetic CSV file
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which writes the expected grand total, row count, and categories to this file

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated CSV of electronic components located at /home/ga/Documents/pcb_components.csv. The generated CSV contains 51 component rows, 7 unique categories, totaling 87 units and a grand total cost of $24.67. The agent is expected to save the output Excel file to /home/ga/Documents/assembly_bom.xlsx. The ground truth values are stored dynamically during task setup in /var/lib/wps_ground_truth/bom_truth.json.
